# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  resourceGroup:
    type: string

resources:
  - name: LogStorageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts@2021-08-01
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    location: 'West US'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportSoftDeletedState: false

  - name: BlobStorageContainer
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers@2021-08-01
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    dependsOn:
      - LogStorageAccount
    properties:
      publicAccess: 'None'

outputs:
  storageAccountName:
    value: ${storageAccountName}
